title: Whale Hunter's Payday
relevance_summary: Phishing attack targeting a Maker vault resulting in loss of 55.47 million DAI

prevention.rule: Block any transaction that changes the ownership of a DSProxy contract.
Monitor for unusual activity involving DSProxy contracts.

monitoring_rules: Block any transaction that changes the ownership of a DSProxy contract.
summary: A crypto whale fell victim to a sophisticated phishing attack, losing 55.47 million DAI by changing the ownership of their DSProxy contract and allowing attackers to withdraw the funds.
